mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_car_cost_cash_pay WHERE waybill_id = #{waybillId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT cccp.*, w.waybill_number, w.container_number, w.route_name, w.business_date, w.load_time, v.vehicle_number, s.short_name, o.order_no FROM t_car_cost_cash_pay cccp LEFT JOIN t_waybill w ON cccp.waybill_id = w.waybill_id LEFT JOIN t_vehicle v ON w.vehicle_id = v.vehicle_id LEFT JOIN t_shipper s ON w.shipper_id = s.shipper_id LEFT JOIN t_order o ON w.order_id = o.order_id WHERE cccp.cash_pay_id = #{moduleId}

SELECT cccp.waybill_id, DATE_FORMAT(cccp.create_time, '%Y%m%d') AS `date`, cccp.remark AS summary, cccp.amount AS payAmount, cccp.category_name, w.driver_id, w.vehicle_id FROM t_car_cost_cash_pay cccp LEFT JOIN t_waybill w ON cccp.waybill_id = w.waybill_id WHERE cccp.audit_status = #{auditStatus} AND cccp.waybill_id IN
#{id}
